archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Modified for KUSWA Brand

rules.backgrounds: Use #FFFFFF or #F5F5F5 primarily. DO NOT use dark backgrounds except for specific highlighted sections or footer.
rules.text_contrast: Ensure APCA minimum contrast. Use #1A202C for primary text, never #000000.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-gray-900

rules.bilingual_support: Implement a toggle that seamlessly switches font families depending on the active language.
rules.alignment: Left-align dense text and paragraphs. Center-align hero headings and section titles.

layout_spacing.containers: Use max-w-7xl mx-auto for main content width.
layout_spacing.border_radius: Soft rounded corners everywhere: rounded-xl to rounded-2xl.
layout_spacing.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows: shadow-lg for cards, hover:shadow-xl for interactive elements.
layout_spacing.grids: Use 12-column bento grids for marketing sections. Use 3-4 column dense grids for photo galleries and team members.

components.marketing: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for dynamic, asymmetrical marketing sections (Hero, About, Impact Stats).
components.interactive: Use customized Shadcn UI for Tabs, Dialogs, Select, Forms (Membership/Contact).
components.icons: Use lucide-react for UI interactions. Use @phosphor-icons/react or react-icons for dense community themes.
components.header: Sticky nav with solid white or very light gray background to ensure legibility of blue/orange gradient elements.
components.footer: Dark Blue background (#0D4F97) with White text for maximum contrast and solid foundation.
components.cards: White background, rounded-2xl, soft shadow-sm, hover:shadow-md transition-all. Minimal borders.

motion.hover_states: Buttons lift (-translate-y-0.5) and glow. Cards subtle lift.
motion.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion for smooth staggered fade-in up for lists (news, events, committee members).

logo.description: KUSWA Brand Logo - Circular emblem with sun, hands, graduation cap

hero.description: Happy children in a rural school in Sylhet, Bangladesh - perfect for education/welfare hero

activities.description: People gathered at an outdoor event with blue banners matching brand
Brown boat on river in Bangladesh, good for rural relief projects
School buildings with children in courtyard

instructions_to_main_agent: Execute fullstack Next.js or React+FastAPI implementation using these specific color variables in Tailwind config.
Add 'Hind Siliguri' and 'Poppins' via Google Fonts.
Implement bilingual state (e.g. using i18n or React Context) that toggles both text content and the font-family class on the body.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='lang-toggle-btn', data-testid='donate-submit').
Build the Membership form exactly matching the fields requested: Name, Father's name, DOB, Address, Profession, Institution, Education, Email, Mobile, Blood group, NID/Birth Reg No.
Ensure Header gradient uses text-transparent background-clip for text, or background gradients for the header bar itself as per the explicit request (linear-gradient(90deg, #0D4F97, #56C2F0)).
Admin dashboard must be JWT protected and include basic CRUD UI for News, Events, Members, and Gallery.
Use provided image URLs directly. DO NOT use generic placeholder text or services.
